mapper.select: select av.id, av.name, av.attr_key_id, av.is_deleted, ak.name attr_key_name from attr_value av left join attr_key ak on av.attr_key_id = ak.id where av.id in (select attr_value_id from room_attr_value where room_id in (select id from room_info where room_id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0))
